raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent output maps against the nearest works, identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta, and provides a clear comparison of rates.",
    "R1.7": "The agent output audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and corrects misattributions.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, including uncertainty disclosure about the Reddi et al. reference and rate comparison assumptions.",
    "RX.3": "The agent output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d) without any drift or scope issues.",
    "RX.4": "The agent output is harm-free, identifies potential errors in the original text, and provides constructive feedback for improvement.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including explanations for each edit and why it was made."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent output maps against the nearest works, identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta, and provides a clear comparison of rates.
rationale.R1.7: The agent output audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and corrects misattributions.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, including uncertainty disclosure about the Reddi et al. reference and rate comparison assumptions.
rationale.RX.3: The agent output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d) without any drift or scope issues.
rationale.RX.4: The agent output is harm-free, identifies potential errors in the original text, and provides constructive feedback for improvement.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, including explanations for each edit and why it was made.
